mcq.question: What is CPU performance?
mcq.correct: How quickly a CPU processes instructions
wrong: How much data a CPU can store
How quickly data is displayed on screen
How many programs a computer can store

mcq.question: What is clock speed measured in?
What does a higher clock speed mean?
wrong: More data can be stored in memory
More programs can run at the same time

mcq.question: What is a CPU core?
wrong: A section of memory used by the CPU
A component that stores data permanently

mcq.question: How does cache memory improve performance?
mcq.correct: It stores frequently used data for faster access
wrong: It increases the clock speed of the CPU
It allows more programs to run at once
It stores data for long-term use
